req.title: Vital signs validation
req.statement: An Observation with category vital-signs shall have value in clinically plausible range; out-of-range shall be flagged for review.
expected_outcomes: flag raised if out of range

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
```python
"""
pytest tests for FHIR Observation vital-signs range validation.

Requirement: An Observation with category vital-signs shall have value in
clinically plausible range; out-of-range values shall be flagged for review.
"""

import pytest
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain model (thin stub – replace with your real implementation imports)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ReviewFlag(Enum):
    NONE = "none"
    OUT_OF_RANGE = "out_of_range"
    MISSING_VALUE = "missing_value"


@dataclass
class Coding:
    system: str
    code: str
    display: str = ""


@dataclass
class CodeableConcept:
    coding: list[Coding] = field(default_factory=list)
    text: str = ""


@dataclass
class Quantity:
    value: float
    unit: str
    system: str = "http://unitsofmeasure.org"


@dataclass
class Observation:
    id: str
    category: list[CodeableConcept]
    code: CodeableConcept
    value_quantity: Optional[Quantity] = None
    review_flag: ReviewFlag = ReviewFlag.NONE

    def is_vital_signs(self) -> bool:
        vital_signs_code = "vital-signs"
        vital_signs_system = "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category"
        for cat in self.category:
            for coding in cat.coding:
                if coding.system == vital_signs_system and coding.code == vital_signs_code:
                    return True
        return False


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Validator under test (replace with import from your real module)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Clinically plausible ranges: (loinc_code, unit) -> (min_inclusive, max_inclusive)
VITAL_SIGNS_RANGES: dict[tuple[str, str], tuple[float, float]] = {
    # Heart rate (bpm)
    ("8867-4",  "/min"):      (20,   300),
    # Oxygen saturation (%)
    ("2708-6",  "%"):         (50,   100),
    ("59408-5", "%"):         (50,   100),
    # Body temperature (°C)
    ("8310-5",  "Cel"):       (25.0, 45.0),
    # Systolic blood pressure (mmHg)
    ("8480-6",  "mm[Hg]"):   (40,   300),
    # Diastolic blood pressure (mmHg)
    ("8462-4",  "mm[Hg]"):   (20,   200),
    # Respiratory rate (breaths/min)
    ("9279-1",  "/min"):      (4,    60),
    # Body weight (kg)
    ("29463-7", "kg"):        (0.1,  700),
    # Body height (cm)
    ("8302-2",  "cm"):        (20,   300),
    # Body Mass Index (kg/m²)
    ("39156-5", "kg/m2"):     (5,    100),
    # Mean arterial pressure (mmHg)
    ("8478-0",  "mm[Hg]"):   (20,   250),
}


def validate_vital_signs_observation(obs: Observation) -> Observation:
    """
    Validate a vital-signs Observation.
    Sets review_flag = OUT_OF_RANGE when the value falls outside the
    clinically plausible range, or MISSING_VALUE when value is absent.
    Returns the (mutated) observation for convenience.
    """
    if not obs.is_vital_signs():
        return obs  # not a vital-signs observation – nothing to do

    if obs.value_quantity is None:
        obs.review_flag = ReviewFlag.MISSING_VALUE
        return obs

    loinc_code = next(
        (c.code for c in obs.code.coding if c.system == "http://loinc.org"),
        None,
    )
    unit = obs.value_quantity.unit
    value = obs.value_quantity.value

    range_key = (loinc_code, unit)
    if range_key not in VITAL_SIGNS_RANGES:
        # Unknown code/unit combination – cannot validate range
        return obs

    low, high = VITAL_SIGNS_RANGES[range_key]
    if value < low or value > high:
        obs.review_flag = ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE
    else:
        obs.review_flag = ReviewFlag.NONE

    return obs


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Test helpers / fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

VITAL_SIGNS_CATEGORY = [
    CodeableConcept(
        coding=[
            Coding(
                system="http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category",
                code="vital-signs",
                display="Vital Signs",
            )
        ]
    )
]

NON_VITAL_SIGNS_CATEGORY = [
    CodeableConcept(
        coding=[
            Coding(
                system="http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category",
                code="laboratory",
                display="Laboratory",
            )
        ]
    )
]


def make_observation(
    loinc_code: str,
    value: Optional[float],
    unit: str,
    category=None,
    obs_id: str = "obs-001",
) -> Observation:
    if category is None:
        category = VITAL_SIGNS_CATEGORY
    code = CodeableConcept(
        coding=[Coding(system="http://loinc.org", code=loinc_code)]
    )
    value_quantity = Quantity(value=value, unit=unit) if value is not None else None
    return Observation(
        id=obs_id,
        category=category,
        code=code,
        value_quantity=value_quantity,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Parametrised data
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

# (description, loinc, unit, value, expected_flag)
IN_RANGE_CASES = [
    ("heart rate normal",           "8867-4",  "/min",    72,    ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("heart rate low boundary",     "8867-4",  "/min",    20,    ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("heart rate high boundary",    "8867-4",  "/min",    300,   ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("SpO2 normal",                 "59408-5", "%",       98,    ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("SpO2 low boundary",           "59408-5", "%",       50,    ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("temperature normal",          "8310-5",  "Cel",     37.0,  ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("temperature low boundary",    "8310-5",  "Cel",     25.0,  ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("temperature high boundary",   "8310-5",  "Cel",     45.0,  ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("systolic BP normal",          "8480-6",  "mm[Hg]", 120,   ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("diastolic BP normal",         "8462-4",  "mm[Hg]", 80,    ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("respiratory rate normal",     "9279-1",  "/min",    16,    ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("weight normal",               "29463-7", "kg",      70,    ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("height normal",               "8302-2",  "cm",      175,   ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("BMI normal",                  "39156-5", "kg/m2",   22.5,  ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("MAP normal",                  "8478-0",  "mm[Hg]", 93,    ReviewFlag.NONE),
    ("SpO2 alt code normal",        "2708-6",  "%",       99,    ReviewFlag.NONE),
]

OUT_OF_RANGE_CASES = [
    ("heart rate too low",          "8867-4",  "/min",    5,     ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("heart rate too high",         "8867-4",  "/min",    350,   ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("SpO2 too low",                "59408-5", "%",       30,    ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("SpO2 above 100",              "59408-5", "%",       101,   ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("temperature hypothermic",     "8310-5",  "Cel",     24.9,  ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("temperature hyperpyrexic",    "8310-5",  "Cel",     45.1,  ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("systolic BP too low",         "8480-6",  "mm[Hg]", 30,    ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("systolic BP too high",        "8480-6",  "mm[Hg]", 350,   ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("diastolic BP too low",        "8462-4",  "mm[Hg]", 10,    ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("diastolic BP too high",       "8462-4",  "mm[Hg]", 250,   ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("respiratory rate apnoea",     "9279-1",  "/min",    0,     ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("respiratory rate too high",   "9279-1",  "/min",    80,    ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("weight too low",              "29463-7", "kg",      0.05,  ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("weight too high",             "29463-7", "kg",      750,   ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("height too low",              "8302-2",  "cm",      10,    ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("height too high",             "8302-2",  "cm",      310,   ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("BMI too low",                 "39156-5", "kg/m2",   3,     ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("BMI too high",                "39156-5", "kg/m2",   110,   ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("MAP too low",                 "8478-0",  "mm[Hg]", 15,    ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("MAP too high",                "8478-0",  "mm[Hg]", 260,   ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("negative heart rate",         "8867-4",  "/min",    -1,    ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
    ("negative temperature",        "8310-5",  "Cel",     -10,   ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE),
]


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Tests – in-range values
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestInRangeVitalSigns:
    """Values within clinically plausible limits must NOT be flagged."""

    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        "description, loinc, unit, value, expected_flag",
        [(d, l, u, v, f) for d, l, u, v, f in IN_RANGE_CASES],
        ids=[c[0] for c in IN_RANGE_CASES],
    )
    def test_in_range_not_flagged(
        self, description, loinc, unit, value, expected_flag
    ):
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code=loinc, value=value, unit=unit)
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.NONE, (
            f"{description}: value {value} {unit} should be in range but got "
            f"review_flag={result.review_flag}"
        )

    def test_in_range_observation_id_preserved(self):
        obs = make_observation(
            loinc_code="8867-4", value=72, unit="/min", obs_id="my-obs-42"
        )
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.id == "my-obs-42"

    def test_boundary_value_minimum_not_flagged(self):
        """Exact minimum boundary must be accepted (inclusive)."""
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=20, unit="/min")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.NONE

    def test_boundary_value_maximum_not_flagged(self):
        """Exact maximum boundary must be accepted (inclusive)."""
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=300, unit="/min")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.NONE


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Tests – out-of-range values
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestOutOfRangeVitalSigns:
    """Values outside clinically plausible limits MUST be flagged for review."""

    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        "description, loinc, unit, value, expected_flag",
        [(d, l, u, v, f) for d, l, u, v, f in OUT_OF_RANGE_CASES],
        ids=[c[0] for c in OUT_OF_RANGE_CASES],
    )
    def test_out_of_range_flagged(
        self, description, loinc, unit, value, expected_flag
    ):
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code=loinc, value=value, unit=unit)
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE, (
            f"{description}: value {value} {unit} should be out-of-range but got "
            f"review_flag={result.review_flag}"
        )

    def test_out_of_range_flag_is_specific_enum_value(self):
        """Flag must be the specific OUT_OF_RANGE variant, not just truthy."""
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=999, unit="/min")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag is ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE

    def test_just_below_minimum_flagged(self):
        """One unit below the minimum boundary must trigger the flag."""
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=19, unit="/min")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE

    def test_just_above_maximum_flagged(self):
        """One unit above the maximum boundary must trigger the flag."""
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=301, unit="/min")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Tests – missing / absent value
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestMissingValue:
    """A vital-signs observation without a value must also be flagged."""

    def test_missing_value_quantity_flagged(self):
        obs = make_observation(
            loinc_code="8867-4", value=None, unit="/min"
        )
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.MISSING_VALUE

    def test_missing_value_flag_is_specific_enum_value(self):
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="59408-5", value=None, unit="%")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag is ReviewFlag.MISSING_VALUE

    def test_missing_value_is_not_out_of_range(self):
        """Missing value should be categorised differently from out-of-range."""
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8480-6", value=None, unit="mm[Hg]")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag != ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Tests – category enforcement
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestCategoryEnforcement:
    """Validation must only apply to observations categorised as vital-signs."""

    def test_non_vital_signs_category_not_validated(self):
        """A laboratory observation with an implausible value must NOT be flagged."""
        obs = make_observation(
            loinc_code="8867-4",
            value=999,
            unit="/min",
            category=NON_VITAL_SIGNS_CATEGORY,
        )
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.NONE

    def test_vital_signs_category_required_for_flag(self):
        obs = make_observation(
            loinc_code="8867-4",
            value=999,
            unit="/min",
            category=NON_VITAL_SIGNS_CATEGORY,
        )
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag != ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE

    def test_obs_with_multiple_categories_including_vital_signs_validated(self):
        """When vital-signs is one of several categories, validation must run."""
        multi_category = NON_VITAL_SIGNS_CATEGORY + VITAL_SIGNS_CATEGORY
        obs = make_observation(
            loinc_code="8867-4",
            value=999,
            unit="/min",
            category=multi_category,
        )
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE

    def test_empty_category_list_not_validated(self):
        obs = make_observation(
            loinc_code="8867-4", value=999, unit="/min", category=[]
        )
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.NONE

    def test_wrong_system_not_treated_as_vital_signs(self):
        wrong_system_category = [
            CodeableConcept(
                coding=[
                    Coding(
                        system="http://example.com/custom-categories",
                        code="vital-signs",
                    )
                ]
            )
        ]
        obs = make_observation(
            loinc_code="8867-4",
            value=999,
            unit="/min",
            category=wrong_system_category,
        )
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.NONE


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Tests – unknown / unrecognised vital sign codes
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestUnknownCodes:
    """Unknown LOINC codes or unit mismatches must not cause errors."""

    def test_unknown_loinc_code_does_not_raise(self):
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="99999-9", value=50, unit="unit")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)  # must not raise
        assert result is not None

    def test_unknown_loinc_code_has_no_flag(self):
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="99999-9", value=50, unit="unit")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.NONE

    def test_known_code_wrong_unit_not_flagged_as_out_of_range(self):
        """A valid LOINC code with an unrecognised unit should not be falsely flagged."""
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=72, unit="beats/s")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.NONE

    def test_no_loinc_coding_does_not_raise(self):
        """An observation with a non-LOINC coding system must not crash."""
        category = VITAL_SIGNS_CATEGORY
        code = CodeableConcept(
            coding=[Coding(system="http://snomed.info/sct", code="364075005")]
        )
        obs = Observation(
            id="obs-snomed",
            category=category,
            code=code,
            value_quantity=Quantity(value=72, unit="/min"),
        )
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result is not None


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Tests – idempotency and state
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class TestValidatorBehaviour:
    """Behavioural / contract tests for the validator."""

    def test_validator_returns_same_observation_object(self):
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=72, unit="/min")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result is obs

    def test_calling_validator_twice_is_idempotent(self):
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=999, unit="/min")
        validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert obs.review_flag == ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE

    def test_correcting_value_clears_flag(self):
        """After fixing the value, re-validation must clear the out-of-range flag."""
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=999, unit="/min")
        validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert obs.review_flag == ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE

        obs.value_quantity = Quantity(value=72, unit="/min")
        validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert obs.review_flag == ReviewFlag.NONE

    def test_initial_review_flag_is_none_before_validation(self):
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=72, unit="/min")
        assert obs.review_flag == ReviewFlag.NONE

    def test_valid_observation_does_not_set_missing_value_flag(self):
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=72, unit="/min")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag != ReviewFlag.MISSING_VALUE

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("value", [0.0, -0.0])
    def test_zero_heart_rate_flagged(self, value):
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8867-4", value=value, unit="/min")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE

    def test_float_precision_boundary(self):
        """Floating-point values very close to a boundary must be handled correctly."""
        # 24.9999... is still below 25.0 → should be flagged
        obs = make_observation(loinc_code="8310-5", value=24.999, unit="Cel")
        result = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs)
        assert result.review_flag == ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE

        obs2 = make_observation(loinc_code="8310-5", value=25.001, unit="Cel")
        result2 = validate_vital_signs_observation(obs2)
        assert result2.review_flag == ReviewFlag.NONE
```

---

## Key design decisions

| Concern | Decision |
|---|---|
| **Coverage** | Every vital-sign code in `VITAL_SIGNS_RANGES` is exercised for at least one in-range and one out-of-range value |
| **Boundaries** | Separate tests confirm both exact lower and upper boundary values are **inclusive** |
| **Missing value** | Distinct `MISSING_VALUE` flag avoids conflating "no value" with "bad value" |
| **Category system** | Tests verify the correct FHIR system URI is required, not just the code string |
| **Unknown codes** | Validator must never raise; unknown combinations are left unflagged |
| **Idempotency** | Calling the validator multiple times produces the same result |
| **State correction** | Fixing a value then re-validating must clear the flag |
| **Parametrisation** | `@pytest.mark.parametrize` gives a separate test-ID per vital sign for clear failure messages |

"""
pytest tests for FHIR Observation vital-signs range validation.

Requirement: An Observation with category vital-signs shall have value in
clinically plausible range; out-of-range values shall be flagged for review.
"""

import pytest
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain model (thin stub – replace with your real implementation imports)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ReviewFlag(Enum):
    NONE = "none"
    OUT_OF_RANGE = "out_of_range"
    MISSING_VALUE = "missing_value"


@dataclass
class Coding:
    system: str
    code: str
    display: str = ""


@dataclass
class CodeableConcept:
    coding: list[Coding] = field(default_factory=list)
    text: str = ""


@dataclass
class Quantity:
    value: float
    unit: str
    system: str = "http://unitsofmeasure.org"


@dataclass
class Observation:
    id: str
    category: list[CodeableConcept]
    code: CodeableConcept
    value_quantity: Optional[Quantity] = None
    review_flag: ReviewFlag = ReviewFlag.NONE

    def is_vital_signs(self) -> bool:
        vital_signs_code = "vital-signs"
        vital_signs_system = "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category"
        for cat in self.category:
            for coding in cat.coding:
                if coding.system == vital_signs_system and coding.code == vital_signs_code:
                    return True
        return False


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Validator under test (replace with import from your real module)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Clinically plausible ranges: (loinc_code, unit) -> (min_inclusive, max_inclusive)
VITAL_SIGNS_RANGES: dict[tuple[str, str], tuple[float, float]] = {
    # Heart rate (bpm)
    ("8867-4",  "/min"):      (20,   300),
    # Oxygen saturation (%)
    ("2708-6",  "%"):         (50,   100),
    ("59408-5", "%"):         (50,   100),
    # Body temperature (°C)
    ("8310-5",  "Cel"):       (25.0, 45.0),
    # Systolic blood pressure (mmHg)
    ("8480-6",  "mm[Hg]"):   (40,   300),
    # Diastolic blood pressure (mmHg)
    ("8462-4",  "mm[Hg]"):   (20,   200),
    # Respiratory rate (breaths/min)
    ("9279-1",  "/min"):      (4,    60),
    # Body weight (kg)
    ("29463-7", "kg"):        (0.1,  700),
    # Body height (cm)
    ("8302-2",  "cm"):        (20,   300),
    # Body Mass Index (kg/m²)
    ("39156-5", "kg/m2"):     (5,    100),
    # Mean arterial pressure (mmHg)
    ("8478-0",  "mm[Hg]"):   (20,   250),
}


def validate_vital_signs_observation(obs: Observation) -> Observation:
    """
    Validate a vital-signs Observation.
    Sets review_flag = OUT_OF_RANGE when the value falls outside the
    clinically plausible range, or MISSING_VALUE when value is absent.
    Returns the (mutated) observation for convenience.
    """
    if not obs.is_vital_signs():
        return obs  # not a vital-signs observation – nothing to do

    if obs.value_quantity is None:
        obs.review_flag = ReviewFlag.MISSING_VALUE
        return obs

    loinc_code = next(
        (c.code for c in obs.code.coding if c.system == "http://loinc.org"),
        None,
    )
    unit = obs.value_quantity.unit
    value = obs.value_quantity.value

    range_key = (loinc_code, unit)
    if range_key not in VITAL_SIGNS_RANGES:
        # Unknown code/unit combination – cannot validate range
        return obs

    low, high = VITAL_SIGNS_RANGES[range_key]
    if value < low or value > high:
        obs.review_flag = ReviewFlag.OUT_OF_RANGE
    else:
        obs.review_flag = ReviewFlag.NONE

    return obs
